title: LSP rename support

source.subject: compiler: LSP rename feature and corelib bump

body:
## Outcome

LSP rename feature and corelib bump.

## Context

- Workstream **analysis-pipeline** — compiler pipeline and api.json spine.
- Contributes to deliverable **LSP workspace & project graph** (`v02-lsp-workspace`).
- LSP work shares the typed HIR spine with analyze/build; workspace templates feed the project graph pipeline.
- Corelib sources live in the **corelib** submodule; package identity is **corelib** with workspace publish to pckg.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`582170b`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/582170b) — compiler: LSP rename feature and corelib bump
